__comment: Grafana panel spec (Issue 292) — daily LLM spend by provider. Import into any dashboard: panel JSON only, datasource uid is a placeholder for the default Prometheus datasource. The llm_cost_usd_total counter ships with Issues 290/291.
title: LLM spend (USD, daily rate, by provider)
description: increase() of the llm_cost_usd_total counter over 1d, summed per provider. Estimates from the config.py price book (PRICE_BOOK_VERSION) — not invoice truth. Reconcile monthly per RUNBOOKS.md § Monthly Cost Review.
